name: New Year's Pork Roast with Saurkraut
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork roast in a roasting pan on a rack.
2. Fill the roasting pan with saurkraut and cover.
3. At midnight on New Year's Eve, put the entire setup in a 175°F oven.
4. When you wake up on New Year's Day, check if the pork roast is dry. If it is, add beer; then let it cook until noon.
5. At noon, bury the hot dog in the saurkraut for 15-30 minutes and serve with the sauerkraut. Let the roast continue cooking for 4-5 more hours.
6. Make mashed potatoes and spread them over everything. Eat.
If you use hot dogs without skin, they will fall apart.
